title: Target Distribution
summary: Assigning targets across squadron to maximize destruction efficiency.
details: Assign targets to avoid overkill while ensuring destruction. Pair ships against tougher enemies. Single ships against fighters. Call targets clearly: 'Alpha takes bandit one, Beta takes bandit two.' Reassign immediately when target is destroyed. Consider ship loadout when assigning - missile boats against hardened targets, gun platforms against fighters. Track who is engaging what to prevent confusion.
annotations: Efficient target distribution wins battles of attrition.
Reassignment speed matters when targets go down.
